brief_summary_anonymized: Banking-major retainer needs Ramadan content that combines financial-institution dignity with religious-month warmth.
strategic_insight: A bank in Ramadan is not selling — it is honoring. The brand's role is to receive deposits of trust quietly, like the season itself.
execution_summary: Classical-Arabic-warm register. Subdued palette. Brand-as-presence rather than brand-as-promoter. Visual: family scenes, charity programs, generosity moments — bank logo appears subtly at end.
what_made_it_work: Dignified register beats aggressive Ramadan-promo language for institutions
Brand-as-presence (not brand-as-promoter) is the right Ramadan posture for banks
Heritage register lands credibility for multi-generational financial institution
what_would_NOT_transplant: Wrong fit for challenger fintech (reads parental)
